summary: Landing page implementation meets all requirements. Hero section includes CareerAC branding headline, comprehensive subheadline covering AI-powered transfer planning, failure recovery, and community playbooks. CTA button correctly navigates to /auth/signup. Page is fully mobile-responsive with Tailwind CSS. Tests cover all key functionality.
sharedStateObservations: Worker followed TDD approach - wrote tests before implementation (page.test.tsx)
Responsive design properly uses Tailwind classes: sm:px-8, sm:text-5xl, sm:flex-row for mobile-first breakpoints
Dark mode support included via dark: prefixed classes (dark:bg-zinc-950, dark:text-white, etc.)
Tests use React Testing Library with accessible queries (getByRole, getByText)
Layout metadata updated to CareerAC branding alongside landing page implementation

commandsRun.observation: 5 tests passing: hero headline, AI-powered mention, failure recovery mention, playbooks mention, CTA button link to /auth/signup
